speaker: speaker1
text: Have you decided what you ’ re going to do during your holiday ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . I ’ m going to travel around Europe .

speaker: speaker1
text: Wow , that sounds great ! Where are you going ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I think I will start off in Paris . Then I ’ m going to take the train to Nice and then go on to Milan .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh that will be lovely . You ’ ll be able to do lots of shopping I expect .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh yes and try lots of new food too .

speaker: speaker1
text: Great . Make sure you buy me a souvenir !

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , don ’ t worry , I will !
